hypotheses.title: TST Dissolution Kinetics in the Surface-Reaction-Limited Regime of Low Drug-Loading ASDs
hypotheses.bridge: TST rate law with Damkohler criterion applied to drug-polymer H-bond disruption kinetics
hypotheses.key_prediction: Indomethacin-HPMCAS at 10 wt% loading shows Ea = 65-85 kJ/mol (surface-reaction-limited); at 40 wt% shows Ea = 15-30 kJ/mol (diffusion-limited). Hard falsification: Ea < 35 kJ/mol at 10% loading.
corrections_needed: Ea 60-80 kJ/mol must be reattributed from Gislason & Oelkers 2003 to ab initio Si-O hydrolysis studies

hypotheses.title: Grambow Rate Law 2 Predicts Competitive Passivation-Erosion Kinetics and Regime Switching in ASD Dissolution
hypotheses.bridge: Nuclear waste glass Rate Law 2 competitive passivation-erosion ODE with reptation-derived polymer erosion rate
hypotheses.key_prediction: HPMCAS-H shows parabolic release, HPMCAS-M shows zero-order, HPMCAS-L shows erosion-controlled — solely determined by polymer MW. k_erase scales as MW^-3.4.
corrections_needed: MW scaling exponent should be ~3.4 not 3.5

hypotheses.title: Dual Saturation Index Competition Predicts LLPS vs. Crystallization Pathway Switching in Ionizable Drug ASD Dissolution
hypotheses.bridge: PHREEQC-style simultaneous SI computation for dual LLPS and crystallization pathway prediction with Ostwald Rule sequencing
hypotheses.key_prediction: At pH 6.8, LLPS precedes crystallization by >15 min for posaconazole. At intermediate pH (4-5), LLPS and crystallization are concurrent (<5 min lag). 12-condition matrix: correct in >=9/12 conditions.
corrections_needed: MFAD citation: 'Kasimova et al.' must be corrected to 'Schall, Capellades & Myerson (CrystEngComm 2019)'

hypotheses.title: Nucleation-Controlled Ostwald Ripening with Polymer Inhibition Predicts ASD Phase Evolution Trajectories
hypotheses.bridge: Competitive nucleation-growth with selective polymer crystallization inhibition from materials science
hypotheses.key_prediction: Polymer selectively inhibits crystallization but not LLPS. Three phase evolution regimes predicted based on polymer concentration and supersaturation. Model predicts correct trajectory in >=8/10 conditions.
corrections_needed: Selective polymer non-adsorption to LLPS droplets must be verified experimentally

hypotheses.title: Pressure-Fracture Competition Regime Map for ASD Manufacturing Optimization
hypotheses.bridge: Geochemical activation volume pressure-dependent kinetics applied to ASD tablet compression optimization
hypotheses.key_prediction: Dimensionless Pc number predicts pressure-controlled vs fracture-controlled vs competition regime during ASD tablet manufacturing. Framework predicts correct regime in >=9/12 conditions.
corrections_needed: Must demonstrate activation volume effect is detectable above mechanical noise at pharmaceutical pressures (10-200 MPa)

failed_hypotheses.title: Hybrid Buffer-Switch Model for pH-Adaptive ASD Dissolution Control
failed_hypotheses.reason: INSUFFICIENT NOVELTY: Primarily redescribes known HPMCAS pH-dependent dissolution with geochemical terminology

summary.session_quality: HIGH — strong novel cross-field connections with rigorous mechanistic detail
